en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Occupational Health Commission Registration Certificate in the Costa Rica Occupational Health Commission Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t
Costa Rica Occupational Health Commission Registration

The Occupational Health Commission Registration certificate can be obtained via the Occupational Health Council (CSO) digital platform’s “file consultation” section. A sample of Occupational Health Commission Registration certificate can be found here\n\nArticle 288 of the Labor Code
Please upload your Occupational Health Commission Registration certificate in accordance with the Costa Rican Labor Code.
